news.title: Newcastle cocktail legends Mother Mercy to open new bar in the North East - Chronicle Live
news.summary:
# Summary

Visitors to the area will appreciate having access to another high-quality cocktail destination from established mixologists known for their craft. This expansion signals growing confidence in the local hospitality scene and offers more options for those seeking premium cocktail experiences beyond the original Mother Mercy location.
